visual_description: A static, medium shot captures a dimly lit bedroom at night. In the foreground, a young boy with short brown hair, wearing a striped sweater, stands with his back to the camera, facing a closed wooden door. To the left, a person lies in bed, covered by a green patterned blanket, seemingly asleep. A warm light from a table lamp on a small nightstand illuminates the scene. The audio is dominated by the loud, high-pitched, and continuous buzzing of a telephone ringing. The camera angle shifts slightly, revealing more of the room, including a set of French doors in the background. The boy, still with his back to the camera, reaches out and turns the doorknob, opening the door. A young boy's voice, sounding sleepy and slightly muffled as if he's just been woken up, speaks in a low, drawn-out tone, saying, "Restaurant." The person in bed remains asleep, undisturbed by the sound. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the boy and the bedroom.
